CVE-2022-26945.title: go-getter up to 1.5.11 and 2.0.2 allowed protocol switching, endl ...
CVE-2022-26945.summary: go-getter up to 1.5.11 and 2.0.2 allowed protocol switching, endless redirect, and configuration bypass via abuse of custom HTTP response header processing. Fixed in 1.6.1 and 2.1.0.

CVE-2022-30321.title: go-getter up to 1.5.11 and 2.0.2 allowed arbitrary host access vi ...
CVE-2022-30321.summary: go-getter up to 1.5.11 and 2.0.2 allowed arbitrary host access via go-getter path traversal, symlink processing, and command injection flaws. Fixed in 1.6.1 and 2.1.0.

CVE-2022-30322.summary: go-getter up to 1.5.11 and 2.0.2 allowed asymmetric resource exhaustion when go-getter processed malicious HTTP responses. Fixed in 1.6.1 and 2.1.0.

CVE-2022-30323.title: go-getter up to 1.5.11 and 2.0.2 panicked when processing passwor ...
CVE-2022-30323.summary: go-getter up to 1.5.11 and 2.0.2 panicked when processing password-protected ZIP files. Fixed in 1.6.1 and 2.1.0.

CVE-2023-0475.title: HashiCorp go-getter up to 1.6.2 and 2.1.1 is vulnerable to decomp ...
CVE-2023-0475.summary: HashiCorp go-getter up to 1.6.2 and 2.1.1 is vulnerable to decompression bombs. Fixed in 1.7.0 and 2.2.0.

CVE-2024-3817.title: HashiCorp’s go-getter library is vulnerable to argument injection ...
CVE-2024-3817.summary:
HashiCorp’s go-getter library is vulnerable to argument injection when executing Git to discover remote branches. 

This vulnerability does not affect the go-getter/v2 branch and package.

CVE-2024-6257.title: HashiCorp’s go-getter library can be coerced into executing Git u ...
CVE-2024-6257.summary: HashiCorp’s go-getter library can be coerced into executing Git update on an existing maliciously modified Git Configuration, potentially leading to arbitrary code execution.
